    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Launcher
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
     
    Main - Class in application
     
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
     
    makeCellImage(Image) - Method in class gui.GameController
    Creates an ImageView sized to fit inside a cell.
    makeHardEnemyQuadrant(Image, Enemy, int, int) - Method in class gui.GameController
    สร้าง ImageView ที่แสดงเฉพาะ 1 quadrant ของรูป Hard enemy เมื่อ 4 ช่อง 2×2 มาเรียงกันจะรวมกันเป็นรูปเดียวเต็มตัว - (anchor) → quadrant top-left - (anchor.x + 1) → quadrant top-right - (anchor.y + 1) → quadrant bottom-left - (both + 1) → quadrant bottom-right
    makeHintLabel(String, double) - Method in class gui.GameController
     
    makePlayerCellGraphic(Image) - Method in class gui.GameController
    Creates the graphic for the player's tile: WoodEdge.png as an outer frame with the player sprite centred on top.

    MEDIUM - Enum constant in enum class game.entity.Level
     
    mediumElementForStage() - Method in class game.entity.EnemySpawner
    เลือก element ของ MEDIUM enemy ตาม stage: Stage 1: WATER 100% Stage 2: ELECTRIC 70% / FIRE 30% Stage 3: FIRE 70% / WATER 30% Stage 4: WATER 70% / ELECTRIC 30% Stage 5: 33/33/33 และพยายามไม่ให้ element ซ้ำกับตัวก่อนหน้า
    MediumEnemy - Class in game.entity

    model - package model
     
    move(Tile[][], Seaweed[][], List<Enemy>, int, int, int, int) - Method in class game.entity.EasyEnemy
     
    move(Tile[][], Seaweed[][], List<Enemy>, int, int, int, int) - Method in class game.entity.Enemy
    Move this enemy one step.
    move(Tile[][], Seaweed[][], List<Enemy>, int, int, int, int) - Method in class game.entity.HardEnemy
     
    move(Tile[][], Seaweed[][], List<Enemy>, int, int, int, int) - Method in class game.entity.MediumEnemy
     
    moveFollowPlayer(Tile[][], Seaweed[][], List<Enemy>, int, int, int, int) - Method in class game.entity.Enemy
    Move toward the player using Manhattan-distance greedy search.
    moveRandom(Tile[][], Seaweed[][], List<Enemy>, int, int) - Method in class game.entity.Enemy
    Continue in the current direction; turn on obstacle; reverse as last resort.
